message:
feat(db): semantic bridge and search service enhancements

Improve search service integration with the semantic search infrastructure
and enhance database query patterns.

Search service:
- Add AutoInitSemanticEmbedder wrapper for auto-initialization
- Bridge to two-tier context with fast/quality embedding fallback
- Better error recovery when semantic models unavailable
- Expanded imports for hybrid search support

Search v3 module:
- Additional search capabilities and query patterns

Query improvements:
- Minor query refinements for search operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
